query:
INSERT INTO weekly_stats (year, week, running_km, cycling_km, swimming_m)
                                VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
                                ON CONFLICT (year, week) DO UPDATE SET
                                    running_km = EXCLUDED.running_km,
                                    cycling_km = EXCLUDED.cycling_km,
                                    swimming_m = EXCLUDED.swimming_m
